main.title: Welcome to the main page
main.description: This is the main page. It will be displayed first after you sign in. Please edit /src/pages/index.tsx to build your app. Please check GitHub for more information.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: This page contains the privacy policy for using the service. Please read the policy before using the service and understand how your personal information is used.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: This page contains the terms of service for using the service. Please read the policy before using the service and understand the prohibited activities.

notfound.title: 404 Not Found
notfound.description: Sorry, the page you are looking for could not be found.

update.title: Connect Google Account
update.description: You can connect your guest account with a Google account to access more services.
update.button: Sign in with Google to connect

signout.title: Sign out from this device
signout.warning: If you have a guest account, your data will be deleted.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.warning: Deleting your account will remove all your data.

sign.warning: By continuing, you agree to the following policies.
